speaker: MATT
raw_text: For right now, I need you, just for right now, Scanlan, roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Facing away from me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Facing away from you. You see, all of you, that the somewhat dark and shadowed ravine is now suddenly aglow with bright vibrant bluish light. The blue light turns to crimson, to a deep burning red, and you hear this horrible, deep sucking sound. And you watch as Yenk the goristro is thrown from it, landing in the center of the ravine, fist to the ground--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're going to die!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Are you leaving the gate open?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I close it instantly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, the gate slams shut behind, the reddish light then now being consumed with a final blip of blue before it disappears.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to tiptoe backwards into the mansion.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, the goristro swoops the head over in your direction. I need you to make a stealth check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's a seven.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, Sam! (groans)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (whispers) Roll a little better.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch as the hulking behemoth, its extremely muscular body covered in fur and bony protrusions like spikes that jut out of its form, horrible hooked teeth and giant curled horns that push forward with brass jewelry emblazoned across the bone. Whips around, its red eyes beaming straight on you. In a deep, guttural voice, it (foreign words) and begins to just lumber in your direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Going to use the rest of his action to climb up. Gets all the way to the top of the ravine, which is about at the same height that Vorugal is. Based on your help, I need you to roll another stealth check because you helped him for the last half hour. You have advantage because she was helping you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have advantage on dexterity saving throws.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. This is a bite attack, so it doesn't matter. So that is a 26?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. So you take 22 points of piercing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Can I Uncanny Dodge this? Is this melee?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's a melee attack, so you can do that. Plus 14 points of cold damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Which is halved because of my armor, so 26 down to 13 and seven. 20 total.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, 20 total, reduced by half because of Uncanny Dodge, you said?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so I'm down to 95.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So 95. You pull away to about there, the rest of your movement?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I want to use bonus action to dash. I don't know if that gets me 60 feet away flying.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Flying, so it would be 30.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's 120 hasted, so 60 feet halved.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so yeah, you can get all the way to the ground if you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You get down to the ground about there if you want. Okay. Now I need you to go ahead and roll initiative and put you on the initiative order.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, sir.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have now engaged.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so it's an 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: An 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Have you said anything in the earpiece yet?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, you guys saw it. People inside can't hear me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so comes back to the top of the round now. Yenk is currently climbing up the side. Gets about halfway up the side. Is not entirely up, but is clawing up, and you feel the impact from where you're standing, Percy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm holding.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You do. Go ahead and roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It needs to solidly hit something.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: To stick within 60 feet. Got it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can't throw it as hard as you can and it'll teleport you wherever it lands. It has to impact.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to press a torso push with this, by the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm going to press a torso push. Better! 33. I don't even know why I bother. He's automatically pushed ten feet away from me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He does still get the one hit on you, which is 27.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You take 23 points of bludgeoning damage from the fist, and then the fist seems to sparkle with electrical energy as it goes to impact you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's magic.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is not a magic spell, no. You take six points of lightning damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yenk is on top?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yenk is at the top of the ravine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Isn't Percy halfway down?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yenk got up to where he would see him and then saw him as he was passing by. Stopped to slam him.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So 23 plus six. That's fine. The lightning damage, the cloak doesn't absorb that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Then I'm going to do my damage on him, which is new to me. That's terrible. That's 11 points of damage, plus two points of psychic damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 13 points of damage. Gets pushed back. Because he's still holding onto the edge, he has to see if he can-- No, it does not. Yenk loses grip from the blast of the gun after punching you, stumbles back. Claw hits the edge and falls down prone to the ground at the base of the ravine. 40 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: 50 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 50 feet. Taking an additional 16 points of bludgeoning damage, which is halved.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Do I join the initiative order?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Those who are entering the fray, roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't roll?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Don't have to roll; you're immune to fear. Yenk makes his saving throw, so Yenk is not afraid, either.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Thanks, Pike! Should we pop out? Should we do this?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, not yet!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: After 12 seconds, I will look. I will stick my head out and look again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Vorugal is now watching the battlefield and seeing the people that have been revealed. Vorugal's going to go up a little higher.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's a total not-a-good-hunter. I thought he enjoyed the hunt!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He doesn't enjoy being ambushed or in a fight that he can't win.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I've poked my head out to look.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You look out and you see Vorugal way high in the air. You see Yenk on the ground, and you see a couple of your companions less stealthed than they were before.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What's it looking like, Scanlan?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I pop my head back in and I tell them  shit's going down. Should we go out or let this play out a bit? Yenk is not dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Jenga!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: They can't hear you, Percy. I can hear you, but they can't.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yenk is not dead, so we will be fighting Yenk, as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We can't leave them out there alone.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I guess we go.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Right? Are we going to leave them out there to die?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I can try and ground him. It's a strength saving throw, though; it's going to be tough.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Try and ground Vorugal? Try it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I say, excuse me, Scanlan.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Divine Intervention? All right, so you step out and you see this chaos happen: the dragon in the air, the fiend on the side, swinging and barely missing a flying Vax, who swoops past in the middle of this sleet storm. You close your eyes and concentrate, holding your holy symbol, praying that Sarenrae has the ability to reach beyond the Divine Gate and lend you her strength temporarily. I need you to roll a d10.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Into Vorugal?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Vorugal's face. That's halfsies, so I'm going to roll it again. That's way better. That is a 32.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That hits. How many Luck have you used, by the way?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: One. That is 12 plus the psychic damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I thought you used Luck once before, today.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't think so. Not since waking up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It would have been yesterday. You're right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 12, plus two is 14, and I'm going to cast Divine Smite-- no, I'm not. No, just 14 of damage, so that's movement, action. My next action I'm going to use to fly under him, halfway between Percival and the gang, and land on the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Land on the wall this way?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Now, that wall is higher up than it looks, so I'm really flying straight, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct. We'll say you're about there, technically.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, and then for a bonus action, my last spell slot, I'm going to cast Shield of Faith on my fucking self for a plus two to AC.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go. Ending Vax's turn. Pike, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yikes. Well. Are we outside the mansion?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you're inside the mansion right now. You just watched Grog, Kima, and Scanlan all dart out of it. Well, you didn't see Scanlan leave. Scanlan vanished.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan vanished.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's you, Trinket, and Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did I ever get on the initiative order?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What did you roll? Ten, right? You'd technically be after Vax. We'll do your turn after this, but you're after Vax.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to pop out. Maybe I can stay in there and do this, in the door, and try to cast Divine Intervention.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Pike's now unconscious. Okay. Vorugal is now in this ravenous, primal rage, and is trying to finish things off successively that have been a problem. Now, with that, both of them are unconscious on the ground, Scanlan's out of the picture, Keyleth is still standing right by the side of the tree. Pike, you're up next, so I need you to go ahead and roll a death saving throw. Roll a d20.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Pike's alive, and she's super strong.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm just watching everybody barrel to my feet?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Kind of, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: My boyfriend!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That ends Vax's turn. Vex, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck. I'm going to try to get his attention and say, hey, stupid! And then I'm going to hit him because that's all I've got.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 22 does hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do I have sneak attack on him, at all? Marisha is next to him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, he's within range for Marisha. Marisha is not threatening him, at the moment.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So no sneak attack, although I was hidden at the end of last turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You were. He did not see you.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm threatening him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) You're growling at him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (counting) 28 on the first.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That was damage. And then the second attack hits. It's a 31. (counting)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: These are sharpshooter shots? It's the 1d10, plus bonus--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: 1d8, plus eight, plus two for dragon, plus Hunter's Mark.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right, there we go. Second one is how much damage?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: 24, with two lighting damage. The first one had four lightning damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Does that end your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) I want to help, I just don't know what I can do. That's all I can keep doing. I'm going to use my bonus action to hide.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it. Roll a stealth check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Like an asshole. 13.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. End of your turn, Vorugal's going to use his second legendary action and is going to swing around with the tail over the top of the rock (impact) to slam down on the conscious Pike. You are prone. It has advantage on the attack roll against you. That is 28 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 22 points of bludgeoning damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm out.
